dc_description: A European town square with a dark stone tiered fountain in the center foreground. Surrounding buildings have warm orange, pink, and beige facades with shuttered windows, balconies, and tiled roofs. On the right is an orange building with a clock tower and arched passageway; signage includes tourist information and a banner reading “Visit Montefiascone.” A large domed church rises in the background to the left. Pale fabric streamers are strung overhead across the square, and outdoor café tables, umbrellas, potted plants, and a few pedestrians are visible. The image has a slightly grainy, soft, film-like appearance, with a blurred bicycle handlebar or similar object crossing the lower foreground.
novel_visual_observations: The clock face on the tower shows roughly 9:30. Several red-and-white no-entry traffic signs appear around the square, indicating restricted vehicle access.
rich_context: Piazza Vittorio Emanuele, Le Mosse, Le Coste, Montefiascone, Viterbo, Lazio, 01027, Italia
